---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
resources:
  - assets/Adam_Hardaker_CV.pdf
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    css: styles.css
---

<div style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <a href="assets/Adam_Hardaker_CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="button primary-button" style="text-decoration: none;">
    {{< fa file-pdf >}} Download PDF CV
  </a>
</div>

::: {.cv-container}

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <h2>Adam Hardaker</h2>
  <p>m.a.hardaker@proton.me Kassel, Germany</p>
</div>

### RESEARCH FOCUS
Causal Machine Learning (Double/Debiased Machine Learning), Bibliometrics, Economics of Innovation and Higher Education, Academic Mobility

### PUBLICATIONS
**No evidence that non-incentivized behavioral interventions effectively mitigate climate change after adjusting for publication bias**  
Hardaker, A., Asanov, I., Bartoš, F., & Bruns, S. B. PNAS Nexus, 2026; [https://doi.org/10.1093/pnasnexus/pgag150](https://doi.org/10.1093/pnasnexus/pgag150)

### PRESENTATIONS
- **06/2025** 2025 Reading Group in Innovation Studies (REGIS), Bordeaux
- **09/2025** 10th Summer School on Data and Algorithms for ST&I Studies, KU Leuven
- **11/2025** Causal Data Science Meeting, Copenhagen Business School
- **06/2026** DRUID26 Conference, Copenhagen Business School

### EMPLOYMENT
**University of Kassel**  
*Doctoral Researcher* | May 2025 - Present | Kassel, Germany  

- Conduct research on academic labor markets, international mobility, and higher education systems using large-scale linked datasets.
- Built an end‑to‑end, modular R pipeline to harmonize and link 1996–2025 academic rosters with multi‑country thesis datasets, delivering a single longitudinal entity store.
- Designed a scalable AI/ML entity‑resolution pipeline to create longitudinal academic record data from complex 1M+ observation data sources. 
- Implemented university name resolution with per‑country rules plus ROR references; produced unmatched reports and achieved high institution coverage across 1M+ EDT records in 8+ countries.
- Delivered QA/ops tooling: scraping + ingestion jobs, 5 Shiny applications for hand-labelling, linkage-review, visualisation, data coverage, and model evaluation.

**IOTA Foundation**  
*Research Analyst & Business Developer* | Feb 2022 - Jul 2023 | Berlin, Germany  

- Spearheaded ecosystem growth initiatives, onboarding 30+ projects to a distributed ledger platform.
- Created and led “Touchpoint”, a global program supporting startups in decentralized technology. 
- Managed 70+ strategic relationships across exchanges, investors, and technology partners, driving 40% ecosystem growth.
- Conducted market research and operational analysis to support growth and product strategy.
- Presented on distributed systems and emerging financial technologies at international conferences.

**U.S. Army**  
*Aviation Maintenance Officer & UH-60A/L Blackhawk Pilot* | Dec 2010 - Jun 2018 | South Korea, Europe, USA  

- Led operations, logistics, and training functions across aviation and maintenance organizations.
- Managed multinational military units of up to 200 personnel in high-responsibility operational environments.
- Directed aviation maintenance and readiness workflows supporting fleets of up to 100 aircraft.
- Planned and executed training programs, operational reporting, and mission coordination under time-sensitive conditions.
- Maintained a spotless safety record while executing 30+ high-priority missions.

### EDUCATION
**University of Kassel**  
*Master of Science; Economic Behavior and Governance* | Mar 2025 | Kassel, Germany  

- GPA: 4.0 (1.2 German scale); Thesis: Leveraging Double/Debiased Machine Learning to Improve Meta-Analyses

**Bard College Berlin**  
*Bachelor of Arts; Economics, Politics, and Social Thought* | May 2022 | Berlin, Germany  

- Awards: DAAD Prize, Best Thesis Prize; GPA: 4.0 (1.0 German scale)

**University of Florida**  
*Bachelor of Science; Agriculture Operations Management* | Dec 2010 | Gainesville, Florida, USA  

### OTHER

- **Technical Skills:** R, Python, SQL, FastAPI, Git, Stata, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Causal Inference, Machine Learning, Statistical Modelling
- **Languages:** English (Native), German (B2) 
- **Leadership:** President of Rugby Cassel (operations, recruitment, web development)
- **Independent Project:** Founder & developer of MeetSpace, an event aggregation platform for scalable local discovery. Developed backend with Python, FastAPI & SQLite.

:::
